news.title:
Top cement firms to report strong Q4 FY26 volumes driven by construction and govt spending.
Profitability could be impacted due to rising fuel and packaging costs, say analysts.
news.summary:
Top cement firms to report strong Q4 FY26 volumes driven by construction and govt spending.
Profitability could be impacted due to rising fuel and packaging costs, say analysts.

news.title:
HDFC Securities lists top cement stocks like Ambuja, UltraTech, JK Cement amid resilient demand but weak pricing power.
Energy costs may rise Rs 300-400/MT FY27-28, impacting margins; Ambuja Cement's target multiple cut to 15.5x.
news.summary:
HDFC Securities lists top cement stocks like Ambuja, UltraTech, JK Cement amid resilient demand but weak pricing power.
Energy costs may rise Rs 300-400/MT FY27-28, impacting margins; Ambuja Cement's target multiple cut to 15.5x.

news.title:
Ambuja Cements announces Scheme of Arrangement with Penna Cement effective from April 10, 2026.
Penna Cement shareholders to receive cash consideration as per Scheme terms; details on Ambuja's website.
news.summary:
Ambuja Cements announces Scheme of Arrangement with Penna Cement effective from April 10, 2026.
Penna Cement shareholders to receive cash consideration as per Scheme terms; details on Ambuja's website.

news.title:
India's cement sector to grow 7-8% in FY26, led by large players like UltraTech Cement and Ambuja Cements at 12% and 10% growth respectively.
JK Cement may see 14% growth; cement prices up 2-3% QoQ, offsetting input costs. Diesel price hike post-elections could pressure margins.
news.summary:
India's cement sector to grow 7-8% in FY26, led by large players like UltraTech Cement and Ambuja Cements at 12% and 10% growth respectively.
JK Cement may see 14% growth; cement prices up 2-3% QoQ, offsetting input costs. Diesel price hike post-elections could pressure margins.

news.title:
BofA cuts target prices for cement stocks like Ambuja, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat citing rising input costs due to crude oil price hikes.
Shree Cement underperformed; BofA sees need for 6-7% price hikes before monsoon to offset cost pressures impacting sector margins.
news.summary:
BofA cuts target prices for cement stocks like Ambuja, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat citing rising input costs due to crude oil price hikes.
Shree Cement underperformed; BofA sees need for 6-7% price hikes before monsoon to offset cost pressures impacting sector margins.

news.title:
Brokerages highlight stock picks like BPCL, GAIL, Tata Steel, SBI Life, and Ambuja Cement across energy, cement, and insurance sectors.
Analysts favor 360One, Nuvama Wealth, Max Healthcare, and domestic cyclicals, citing resilience, market recovery potential, and strategic positioning.
news.summary:
Brokerages highlight stock picks like BPCL, GAIL, Tata Steel, SBI Life, and Ambuja Cement across energy, cement, and insurance sectors.
Analysts favor 360One, Nuvama Wealth, Max Healthcare, and domestic cyclicals, citing resilience, market recovery potential, and strategic positioning.

news.title:
Adani Group firms, including Adani Green, Power, and Ambuja Cements, will release Q4 results in April.
Ambuja's Q4 profit may drop 39% YoY but rise 112% sequentially; no dividend news for FY26 yet.
news.summary:
Adani Group firms, including Adani Green, Power, and Ambuja Cements, will release Q4 results in April.
Ambuja's Q4 profit may drop 39% YoY but rise 112% sequentially; no dividend news for FY26 yet.

news.title:
Sanghi Industries shares to be suspended from April 6, 2026, post amalgamation with Ambuja Cements.
NSE and BSE have notified the trading halt; record date is April 6, 2026.
news.summary:
Sanghi Industries shares to be suspended from April 6, 2026, post amalgamation with Ambuja Cements.
NSE and BSE have notified the trading halt; record date is April 6, 2026.

news.title:
India's cement sector faces margin pressure due to rising fuel and packaging costs.
West Asia conflict impact may hit margins from June quarter amid limited price hikes.
news.summary:
India's cement sector faces margin pressure due to rising fuel and packaging costs.
West Asia conflict impact may hit margins from June quarter amid limited price hikes.

news.title:
DAM Capital upgrades cement sector to 'BUY', citing price hikes of ₹30-₹50/bag and attractive valuations.
UltraTech Cement, JSW Cement, Shree Cement, Ambuja, Dalmia Bharat, and Nuvoco see upsides of 7.4%-21.9%.
news.summary:
DAM Capital upgrades cement sector to 'BUY', citing price hikes of ₹30-₹50/bag and attractive valuations.
UltraTech Cement, JSW Cement, Shree Cement, Ambuja, Dalmia Bharat, and Nuvoco see upsides of 7.4%-21.9%.

news.title:
Nirmal Bang sees robust demand but cautious margins for cement sector amid Q4 results.
ACC's TP cut to Rs 1,622; Ambuja's TP lowered to Rs 558 due to cost, operational challenges.
news.summary:
Nirmal Bang sees robust demand but cautious margins for cement sector amid Q4 results.
ACC's TP cut to Rs 1,622; Ambuja's TP lowered to Rs 558 due to cost, operational challenges.

news.title:
NCLT Ahmedabad approved the Scheme of Arrangement between Penna Cement Industries and Ambuja Cements Ltd, effective from August 16, 2024.
The amalgamation aims to integrate operations, improve efficiency, and enhance shareholder value for Ambuja Cements Ltd.
news.summary:
NCLT Ahmedabad approved the Scheme of Arrangement between Penna Cement Industries and Ambuja Cements Ltd, effective from August 16, 2024.
The amalgamation aims to integrate operations, improve efficiency, and enhance shareholder value for Ambuja Cements Ltd.

news.title:
NCLT Ahmedabad approves merger of Penna Cement with Ambuja Cements.
Ambuja owns 99.9% of Penna; merger streamlines ownership and operations.
news.summary:
NCLT Ahmedabad approves merger of Penna Cement with Ambuja Cements.
Ambuja owns 99.9% of Penna; merger streamlines ownership and operations.

news.title:
NCLT Ahmedabad approves Penna Cement's merger with Ambuja Cements.
Approval marks a key regulatory step in Ambuja Cements' consolidation process.
news.summary:
NCLT Ahmedabad approves Penna Cement's merger with Ambuja Cements.
Approval marks a key regulatory step in Ambuja Cements' consolidation process.

news.title:
Cement stocks, including Nuvoco, JK Cement, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat, and Ambuja, fell 1-3% despite HSBC's positive outlook.
HSBC set price targets, with Nuvoco at ₹420 (+38.5%), Ambuja at ₹590 (+39.9%), and UltraTech at ₹13,750 (+22.7%).
news.summary:
Cement stocks, including Nuvoco, JK Cement, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat, and Ambuja, fell 1-3% despite HSBC's positive outlook.
HSBC set price targets, with Nuvoco at ₹420 (+38.5%), Ambuja at ₹590 (+39.9%), and UltraTech at ₹13,750 (+22.7%).

news.title:
Ambuja Cements saw an NSE block trade of 1,053,587 shares at Rs. 410.7.
The trade valued at approximately Rs. 43.3 crore.
news.summary:
Ambuja Cements saw an NSE block trade of 1,053,587 shares at Rs. 410.7.
The trade valued at approximately Rs. 43.3 crore.

news.title:
HSBC maintains Buy on Ambuja Cements with a target price of Rs 590.
FY27 capacity peaks, FY28 supply-demand improves, Apr-May price hikes offset energy costs.
news.summary:
HSBC maintains Buy on Ambuja Cements with a target price of Rs 590.
FY27 capacity peaks, FY28 supply-demand improves, Apr-May price hikes offset energy costs.

news.title:
Cement stocks like UltraTech, Shree Cement, Ambuja, and Dalmia gained 3-6% before paring gains amid rising input costs.
Nomura suggests price hikes post-March to offset fuel costs; southern, eastern markets show resilience in demand trends.
news.summary:
Cement stocks like UltraTech, Shree Cement, Ambuja, and Dalmia gained 3-6% before paring gains amid rising input costs.
Nomura suggests price hikes post-March to offset fuel costs; southern, eastern markets show resilience in demand trends.

news.title:
Nirmal Bang highlights defence growth with picks like HAL, BEL.
Cement margins face pressure from rising fuel costs; prefers Ambuja, UltraTech.
news.summary:
Nirmal Bang highlights defence growth with picks like HAL, BEL.
Cement margins face pressure from rising fuel costs; prefers Ambuja, UltraTech.

news.title:
Adani Group shifts focus to margins, easing rivalry with UltraTech Cement.
Ambuja Cements may delay FY28 155 mtpa target to enhance utilization and profitability.
news.summary:
Adani Group shifts focus to margins, easing rivalry with UltraTech Cement.
Ambuja Cements may delay FY28 155 mtpa target to enhance utilization and profitability.
